name: topsec-fw-2u
description: OctoBus package for TopSec FW 2U WebUI login, permission activation, blacklist, and logout APIs.

TopSec_FW_2U.TopSec_FW_2U/Login.name: login
TopSec_FW_2U.TopSec_FW_2U/Login.description: Log in to the TopSec FW 2U WebUI.

TopSec_FW_2U.TopSec_FW_2U/ActivatePermis.name: activate-permission
TopSec_FW_2U.TopSec_FW_2U/ActivatePermis.description: Activate the current TopSec FW 2U WebUI permission session.

TopSec_FW_2U.TopSec_FW_2U/AddBlacklistIP.name: add-blacklist-ip
TopSec_FW_2U.TopSec_FW_2U/AddBlacklistIP.description: Add one or more IP addresses to the TopSec FW 2U blacklist.

TopSec_FW_2U.TopSec_FW_2U/DeleteBlacklis.name: delete-blacklist-ip
TopSec_FW_2U.TopSec_FW_2U/DeleteBlacklis.description: Remove one or more IP addresses from the TopSec FW 2U blacklist.

TopSec_FW_2U.TopSec_FW_2U/Logout.name: logout
TopSec_FW_2U.TopSec_FW_2U/Logout.description: Log out from the TopSec FW 2U WebUI.
